title: oberna procumbens
intro: Oberna procumbens, also known as the creeping Oberna, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and it is also used to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. Oberna procumbens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
